arts.ttl: A transfer of Rayan Cherki a topic of debate for Borussia Dortmund’s mangement
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Borussia Dortmund are discussing internally about the prospect of signing Rayan Cherki as the transfer window deadline approaches. Dortmund are said to have watched Cherki for a…

arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Lyon predicted XI v Ludogorets: Malick Fofana and Saïd Benrahma out

arts.ttl: Lyon’s Georges Mikautadze turns down AS Roma move
arts.sum: Things are looking on the up for Georges Mikautadze (24) at Olympique Lyonnais after what was a rocky start to life with Les Gones. After 27 appearances so far with…

arts.ttl: John Textor confirms the imminent appointment of Paulo Fonseca as Lyon head coach
arts.sum: Lyon owner and president John Textor has confirmed to AFP the imminent appointment of Paulo Fonseca as head coach. The Portuguese manager is expected to put pen to paper over a…
